overall.description: First-person perspective inside a cyberpunk-style elevator with digital advertisements, transitioning to a foggy, neon-lit urban street at night. The player exits the elevator and explores a hazy, red-illuminated environment with large billboards and limited visibility, eventually encountering a figure in the fog.

events.description: interior elevator lights dim significantly creating a darker atmosphere

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the elevator control panel and advertisement screens

entered.detail: screen displaying sports car advertisement with '31.1%' and 'SPEED LOVER!!' text in pink and blue
screen displaying close-up face with 'NEW' text in yellow
vertical brushed metal control panel with illuminated green floor buttons and directional arrows
brushed bronze metal walls with horizontal handrails and green accent lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a cyberpunk elevator cab with the camera facing two digital advertisement screens and a central control panel. The interior features metallic bronze walls with green accent lighting. At approximately 11 seconds, the interior lights dim significantly, creating a darker, more ominous atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior facing the exit doors

events.description: elevator metal grate doors open revealing bright light and foggy exterior

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the elevator doors as they prepare to open

entered.detail: metal security gate with diamond mesh pattern that begins to roll upward

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to face the elevator's metal grate security door. The interior remains dimly lit as the metal gate rolls upward, revealing intense bright light and dense red fog from the exterior environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cyberpunk urban street with neon billboards and abandoned debris

events.description: steps out of elevator into dense red fog and neon-lit street environment
discovers a motionless figure standing in the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dense fog, observing neon signs and abandoned street elements while navigating the limited visibility

notable_agents.action: standing motionless in the fog, facing the camera at the end of the street

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'CIRRUS COLA' text in white against red background mounted on building
dense red-tinted fog reducing visibility to near zero and creating diffused neon lighting effects
bright white spotlights piercing through the fog from above
dark concrete and glass buildings with illuminated windows and neon accent strips
vertical digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements on the sidewalk
abandoned objects and wreckage partially visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator, the scene transforms into a dense, red-foggy cyberpunk street at night. A large 'CIRRUS COLA' billboard dominates the view while neon lights pierce through the haze. The camera explores the deserted street, passing digital advertisements and abandoned debris, until encountering a motionless figure standing in the fog ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a cyberpunk elevator into a dense, neon-lit urban wasteland. It begins inside a metallic bronze cab facing digital advertisement screens and a control panel, where the green accent lighting suddenly dims to create an ominous atmosphere. As the camera turns toward the metal grate security door, the gate rolls upward to reveal a blinding light and thick red fog pouring in from the outside. The scene then expands as the camera exits the elevator and enters a deserted street, where the lighting shifts to a hazy red glow dominated by a massive Cirrus Cola billboard and piercing neon signs. Finally, the camera drifts past abandoned debris and digital advertisements through the heavy mist before coming to a halt before a motionless figure standing in the fog.
